WAYBACK + PDF recipe over the ex-presidentes/luiz-inacio-lula-da-silva/discursos tree -> recovers Lula I-II era (2003-2010), which is the ONLY era this source uniquely covers (bra_planalto_old_wayback only reaches 2011+). Uses the NEW engine PDF support (content_type: pdf): the archived PDF bytes are downloaded and text-extracted (pdfminer.six); the DD-MM-YYYY date is read off the URL via a url_regex (named year/month/day groups -> unambiguous ISO). CDX wayback_filter=[mimetype:application/pdf, statuscode:200] keeps only real PDF captures (drops the text/html listing/redirect/@view noise a prefix query returns); link_pattern '/\\d{4}/[^/]+$' keeps the bare PDF object and dedupes against its /@@download twin. Probed 2026-07-09 --spread: 55 speech PDFs harvested, sampled 2003-01-01 (posse) .. 2008; every sampled PDF extracted clean multi-KB body text; dates parse unambiguously from the URL (a handful of undated bare objects get a blank date -> cleaner/tenure fills). speaker_default=Lula da Silva. NOTE: the Internet Archive holds only ~60 of Lula's PDFs (sparse capture) -> this recovers a partial set; the FULL set needs the live site (F5/TSPD + geo-fenced -> only from a Brazilian IP; see bra_biblioteca). Sibling ex-presidents (Dilma/Temer/Bolsonaro/FHC) can be added as more <name>/discursos recipes. FULL RUN is the researcher's gate.
